QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_65

question.text: What is the minimum annual contribution for NPS Vatsalya?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The minimum annual contribution for NPS Vatsalya is Rs.1,000, with no maximum limit. This is the same as regular NPS Tier I. **The Trap:** Rs.500 is the minimum per-transaction for regular NPS Tier I, not the annual minimum for Vatsalya. The annual minimum is Rs.1,000. **Cross-Exam Context:** NPS Vatsalya mirrors regular NPS in many aspects: Rs.1,000/year minimum, choice of PFMs, Active/Auto choice, partial withdrawal after 3 years. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Encourage parents to start NPS Vatsalya with even small amounts. The Rs.1,000 annual minimum is very affordable for most families.
